mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medicine
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medicine(name, code, specification, unit, price, stock, min_stock, supplier, status) VALUES(#{med.name}, #{med.code}, #{med.specification}, #{med.unit}, #{med.price}, #{med.stock}, #{med.minStock}, #{med.supplier}, 1)
